response.justification: Maria presents a compelling profile with significant experience in geospatial data platforms, demonstrated through her GISCollective work and Green Map projects. Her background in low-latency distributed systems using Dlang, coupled with prior C++ experience and a strong emphasis on testing and quality assurance, aligns well with the technical demands of building critical routing data pipelines. While recent C++ experience isn't primary, her systems-level programming expertise and willingness to learn suggest a strong aptitude for the role.
strengths: Deep expertise in geospatial data platforms and processing.
Proven ability to build and operate low-latency distributed systems.
Strong background in C++/Dlang and system-level programming.
concerns: Limited recent hands-on experience with modern C++ or Rust as primary languages.
Specific "routing tiling" expertise is not explicitly demonstrated.
Primary recent roles are more focused on web technologies (Node.js/TypeScript).
